rationale: Review 2 identifies a concrete description-vs-diff mismatch: the PR description claims to add `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` and discharge a TODO, but the diff only adds a private `AlgHom.antipodeComp`. Acting on this note would lead the author to correct a misleading module doc, producing a more accurate PR. Review 1 finds nothing at all. The difference is marginal since neither finds a mathematical flaw, but the description correction is real and grounded in the diff.
